final_prompt.prompt:
Create a pitch deck cover slide for a domestic China fundraising announcement for "GPT-5.5" launch.

Style/medium: needs a China VC roadshow aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a presentation cover slide layout
Subject: must include "GPT-5.5" as the product name, must include Sam Altman as the speaker/presenter
Scene/backdrop: needs a China domestic roadshow atmosphere — exact venue treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a professional investor-pitch atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a GP (General Partner) fund aesthetic direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" / must include speaker name "奥特曼" or "Sam Altman"
Constraints: must preserve China domestic roadshow conventions, must fit GP fund tone
Avoid:
